channel.title: Streaming on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Streaming on Arrans github.io

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: bluenviron/mediamtx
item.description: Ready-to-use SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback video and audio streams.

item.title: ClassicOldSong/Apollo
item.description: Sunshine fork - The easiest way to stream with the native resolution of your client device

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!
